facebook-scrape.summary: Scraped Facebook (1:08 AM ET Apr 1). No new activity since previous run (04:17 UTC). Checked notifications — all unread are friend_confirmed, group_activity (others' posts in Vito's groups), group_post_mention (admin welcome tags), and feedback_reaction_generic. Zero comment notifications on Novaro AI posts. Messenger shows 1 unread (Ann Giroux, same DM from previous run, already counted). Verified Vito's post in USA Car Detailing Services is live and intact. No new posts by Vito today. Cumulative totals unchanged: 18 groups, 18 posts live, 116 comments, 39 positive, 4 DMs, 13 interest signals. Daily Apr 1 entry unchanged: {groups:18, posts:0, comments:3, positive:1, dms:1, interest:1}.

linkedin-scrape.summary: Scraped LinkedIn (1:43 AM ET Apr 1): 1,040 total connections (down 1 from prior run — likely a disconnect or display variance). 181 pending sent requests unchanged — most recent batch of 10 sent ~16 hours ago targeting window cleaning + auto detailing business owners (Jim Black, David Sconza, Justin Walsh, Patrick Winterstein, Aidan Westphalen, Gavin Bilby, Karter Howard, Eli Nash, Jackson Manning, Rex Owen). No new requests sent today. Messaging inbox at 9 unread — no new replies from prospects since last run. Active outbound threads with no responses: Colin Crump, Tyler Grodsky, David Kozak, Jason Stahlberg, William DeMichele, Michael Rose, Rich Iandoli, Stefano Cardillo. Only inbound reply: Vincent Handugan VA counter-pitch (Mar 20, not a buying signal). No new interest signals.
